series_metadata.series_description: Files on Original Participating and Subsequent Participating Tobacco Manufacturers (OPM and SPM) who are parties to the 1998 Tobacco Master Settlement Agreement (MSA) with the State of Ohio. Records include, but are not limited to, collected information on the tobacco product manufacturer, examples of products and brands, annual certification files, and quarterly certification files.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: manufacturer no longer in business and there is no ongoing arbitration involving manufacturer's business/last year of sales. Records not needed in ongoing arbitration case can be destroyed when no longer of administrative value. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of immediately. ; Electronic: manufacturer no longer in business and there is no ongoing arbitration involving manufacturer's business/last year of sales. Records not needed in ongoing arbitration case can be destroyed when no longer of administrative value
